017package org.apache.juneau.marshall.ini;
018
019import static org.apache.juneau.commons.function.Suppliers.*;
020import static org.apache.juneau.commons.utils.AssertionUtils.*;
021
022import java.io.*;
023import java.util.*;
024import java.util.Map.*;
025import java.util.regex.*;
026
027import org.apache.juneau.commons.bean.*;
028import org.apache.juneau.commons.function.*;
029import org.apache.juneau.commons.reflect.*;
030import org.apache.juneau.marshall.*;
031import org.apache.juneau.marshall.collections.*;
032import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json.*;
033import org.apache.juneau.marshall.json5.*;
034import org.apache.juneau.marshall.parser.*;
035import org.apache.juneau.marshall.stream.*;
036
037/**
038 * Session for parsing INI format into POJOs.
039 */
040@SuppressWarnings({
041   "unchecked",
042   "java:S115", // ARG_ctx follows project assertion-param naming convention (ARG_<param>)
043   "java:S3776", "java:S6541", "java:S135",
044   "resource" // Closeable resources are owned by the caller's parser session; Eclipse JDT @Owning warning is by design.
045})
046public class IniParserSession extends ReaderParserSession implements RecordReadable {
047
048   private static final String ARG_ctx = "ctx";
049
050   /** Delimiter for nested section names (e.g. {@code address/street}). */
051   private static final String SECTION_PATH_DELIMITER = "/";
052
053   private final Memoizer<JsonParser> json5Parser = memoizer(
054      () -> Json5Parser.create().marshallingContext((MarshallingContext) getContext()).build()
055   );
056
057   /**
058    * Builder for INI parser session.
059    */
060   public static class Builder extends ReaderParserSession.Builder<Builder> {
061
062      protected Builder(IniParser ctx) {
063         super(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
064      }
065
066      @Override
067      public IniParserSession build() {
068         return new IniParserSession(this);
069      }
070   }
071
072   /**
073    * Creates a session builder.
074    *
075    * @param ctx The parser context.
076    * @return The builder.
077    */
078   public static Builder create(IniParser ctx) {
079      return new Builder(assertArgNotNull(ARG_ctx, ctx));
080   }
081
082   protected IniParserSession(Builder builder) {
083      super(builder);
084   }
085
086   @Override /* RecordReadable */
087   public RecordReader parseRecords(Object input) throws IOException {
088      return RecordAdapter.reader(this, input);
089   }
090
091   @Override /* RecordReadable */
092   public boolean isRecordStreaming() {
093      return false;
094   }
095
096   @Override
097   protected <T> T doParse(ParserPipe pipe, ClassMeta<T> type) throws IOException, ParseException, ExecutableException {
098      try (Reader r = pipe.getParserReader()) {
099         if (r == null)
100            return null;
101         var sections = parseIniContent(r);
102         if (sections.isEmpty())
103            return type.canCreateNewBean(getOuter()) ? type.newInstance(getOuter()) : null;
104         if (!type.isBean() && !type.isMap())
105            throw new ParseException(this, "INI format requires bean or Map<String,?> target. Got: {0}", type.inner().getName());
106         if (type.isMap()) {
107            var result = buildMapFromSections(sections, "");
108            return (T) convertMapToTarget(result, type);
109         }
110         var bm = toBeanMap(type.newInstance(getOuter()));
111         populateBean(bm, sections, "");
112         return type.cast(bm.getBean());
113      }
114   }
115
116   /**
117    * Parses INI content into section -> (key -> raw value) structure.
118    *
119    * @param r The reader.
120    * @return Map of section name to key-value map. Default section uses "".
121    */
122   protected Map<String, Map<String, String>> parseIniContent(Reader r) throws IOException {
123      var sections = new LinkedHashMap<String, Map<String, String>>();
124      var current = sections.computeIfAbsent("", k -> new LinkedHashMap<>());
125      var br = r instanceof BufferedReader r2 ? r2 : new BufferedReader(r);
126      String line;
127      while ((line = br.readLine()) != null) {
128         line = line.trim();
129         if (line.isEmpty() || line.startsWith("#"))
130            continue;
131         if (line.startsWith("[")) {
132            var end = line.indexOf(']');
133            if (end < 0)
134               continue;
135            var sectionName = line.substring(1, end).trim();
136            current = sections.computeIfAbsent(sectionName, k -> new LinkedHashMap<>());
137            continue;
138         }
139         var kv = splitKeyValue(line);
140         if (kv != null) {
141            var key = kv[0].trim();
142            var value = kv[1].trim();
143            // Strip inline comment (# ...) from value (when not inside quotes)
144            value = stripInlineComment(value);
145            current.put(key, value);
146         }
147      }
148      return sections;
149   }
150
151   /**
152    * Splits an INI {@code key=value} / {@code key:value} line into its key and raw-value parts.
153    *
154    * <p>
155    * Behavior mirrors the former {@code ^([^=#\s][^=]*)\s*[=:]\s*(.*)$} regex but without its super-linear
156    * backtracking: an {@code '='} delimiter (if present) binds to the first {@code '='}; otherwise the last
157    * {@code ':'} is used. Surrounding whitespace is left in place (callers trim).
158    *
159    * @param line The (already-trimmed) candidate line.
160    * @return A two-element array of {raw-key, raw-value}, or <jk>null</jk> if the line is not a key/value pair.
161    */
162   private static String[] splitKeyValue(String line) {
163      if (line.isEmpty())
164         return null;
165      var first = line.charAt(0);
166      if (first == '=' || first == '#' || Character.isWhitespace(first))
167         return null;
168      var idx = line.indexOf('=');
169      if (idx < 0)
170         idx = line.lastIndexOf(':');
171      if (idx < 1)
172         return null;
173      return new String[] { line.substring(0, idx), line.substring(idx + 1) };
174   }
175
176   private void populateBean(BeanMap<?> bm, Map<String, Map<String, String>> sections, String sectionPath) throws ParseException, ExecutableException {
177      var defaultSection = sections.get(sectionPath);
178      if (defaultSection != null) {
179         for (Entry<String, String> e : defaultSection.entrySet()) {
180            var key = e.getKey();
181            var rawValue = e.getValue();
182            var pMeta = bm.getMeta().getProperties().get(key);
183            if (pMeta == null && isIgnoreUnknownBeanProperties())
184               continue;
185            if (pMeta == null)
186               throw new ParseException(this, "Unknown property ''{0}''", key);
187            var value = parseValue(rawValue, (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo());
188            bm.put(key, value);
189         }
190      }
191      // Process nested sections
192      for (var entry : sections.entrySet()) {
193         var sectionName = entry.getKey();
194         var sub = entry.getValue();
195         if (sectionName.equals(sectionPath))
196            continue;
197         var isChild = sectionPath.isEmpty() ? !sectionName.contains(SECTION_PATH_DELIMITER)
198            : sectionName.startsWith(sectionPath + SECTION_PATH_DELIMITER);
199         if (!isChild)
200            continue;
201         var childName = sectionPath.isEmpty() ? sectionName
202            : sectionName.substring(sectionPath.length() + SECTION_PATH_DELIMITER.length()).split(Pattern.quote(SECTION_PATH_DELIMITER))[0];
203         var pMeta = bm.getMeta().getProperties().get(childName);
204         if (pMeta == null && isIgnoreUnknownBeanProperties())
205            continue;
206         if (pMeta == null)
207            continue;
208         var cMeta = (ClassMeta<?>) pMeta.getBeanInfo();
209         var childPath = sectionPath.isEmpty() ? childName : sectionPath + SECTION_PATH_DELIMITER + childName;
210         if (cMeta.isBean()) {
211            var child = toBeanMap(cMeta.newInstance(getOuter()));
212            populateBean(child, sections, childPath);
213            bm.put(childName, child.getBean());
214         } else if (cMeta.isMap() && sub != null) {
215            var valueType = cMeta.getValueType();
216            if (valueType == null)
217               valueType = object();
218            var map = new LinkedHashMap<String, Object>();
219            for (Entry<String, String> e : sub.entrySet())
220               map.put(e.getKey(), parseValue(e.getValue(), valueType));
221            bm.put(childName, convertMapToTarget(map, cMeta));
222         }
223      }
224   }
225
226   private Map<String, Object> buildMapFromSections(Map<String, Map<String, String>> sections, String sectionPath) throws ParseException, ExecutableException {
227      var result = new LinkedHashMap<String, Object>();
228      var defaultSection = sections.get(sectionPath);
229      if (defaultSection != null) {
230         for (Entry<String, String> e : defaultSection.entrySet())
231            result.put(e.getKey(), parseValue(e.getValue(), object()));
232      }
233      for (var entry : sections.entrySet()) {
234         var sectionName = entry.getKey();
235         var childSection = entry.getValue();
236         if (sectionName.equals(sectionPath))
237            continue;
238         var isChild = sectionPath.isEmpty() ? !sectionName.contains(SECTION_PATH_DELIMITER)
239            : sectionName.startsWith(sectionPath + SECTION_PATH_DELIMITER);
240         if (!isChild)
241            continue;
242         var childName = sectionPath.isEmpty() ? sectionName
243            : sectionName.substring(sectionPath.length() + SECTION_PATH_DELIMITER.length()).split(Pattern.quote(SECTION_PATH_DELIMITER))[0];
244         if (result.containsKey(childName))
245            continue;
246         var childPath = sectionPath.isEmpty() ? childName : sectionPath + SECTION_PATH_DELIMITER + childName;
247         var hasNested = sections.keySet().stream().anyMatch(s -> s.startsWith(childPath + SECTION_PATH_DELIMITER));
248         if (hasNested) {
249            result.put(childName, buildMapFromSections(sections, childPath));
250         } else if (childSection != null) {
251            var map = new LinkedHashMap<String, Object>();
252            for (Entry<String, String> e : childSection.entrySet())
253               map.put(e.getKey(), parseValue(e.getValue(), object()));
254            result.put(childName, map);
255         }
256      }
257      return result;
258   }
259
260   private Object parseValue(String raw, ClassMeta<?> targetType) throws ParseException, ExecutableException {
261      if (raw == null)
262         return null;
263      var trimmed = raw.trim();
264      if (trimmed.equals("null"))
265         return null;
266      if (trimmed.equalsIgnoreCase("true"))
267         return true;
268      if (trimmed.equalsIgnoreCase("false"))
269         return false;
270      if (trimmed.startsWith("'") && trimmed.endsWith("'") && trimmed.length() >= 2) {
271         var inner = trimmed.substring(1, trimmed.length() - 1).replace("''", "'");
272         return convertToMemberType(null, inner, targetType);
273      }
274      if (trimmed.startsWith("[") || trimmed.startsWith("{"))
275         return getJson5Parser().parse(trimmed, targetType);
276      if (targetType.isNumber()) {
277         try {
278            if (trimmed.contains(".") || trimmed.toLowerCase().contains("e"))
279               return Double.parseDouble(trimmed);
280            return Long.parseLong(trimmed);
281         } catch (@SuppressWarnings("unused") NumberFormatException e) {
282            return convertToMemberType(null, trimmed, targetType);
283         }
284      }
285      if (targetType.isDate())
286         return parseDate(trimmed, targetType);
287      if (targetType.isCalendar())
288         return parseCalendar(trimmed, targetType);
289      if (targetType.isTemporal())
290         return parseTemporal(trimmed, targetType);
291      if (targetType.isDuration())
292         return parseDuration(trimmed);
293      if (targetType.isPeriod())
294         return parsePeriod(trimmed);
295      return convertToMemberType(null, trimmed, targetType);
296   }
297
298   /**
299    * Returns a Json5 parser configured with this session's {@link MarshallingContext}.
300    *
301    * <p>
302    * Required so that format hints carried on the parent {@code IniParser} context (e.g.
303    * {@link LocaleFormat}, {@link TimeZoneFormat}) are honored
304    * when nested JSON5-encoded collection/map values are deserialized.  Using {@code Json5Parser.DEFAULT}
305    * here would silently drop those hints and fall back to the format-default behavior.
306    *
307    * <p>
308    * Memoized via {@link Memoizer} — first call constructs the parser; subsequent calls return
309    * the cached instance.  {@link #parseValue} calls this once per JSON5-encoded value, so a single
310    * builder-construction + parser-instantiation is amortized across the whole INI document rather
311    * than repeated for every {@code […]} / {@code {…}} value.
312    *
313    * <p>
314    * Bug #8: list-of-{@link Locale} values written under {@link LocaleFormat#UNDERSCORE}
315    * (wire form {@code "en_US"}) were being parsed via {@code Locale.forLanguageTag("en_US")} (BCP_47 default)
316    * which returns {@link Locale#ROOT}, dropping the locale content.
317    */
318   private JsonParser getJson5Parser() {
319      return json5Parser.get();
320   }
321
322   private static Object convertMapToTarget(Map<String, Object> map, ClassMeta<?> type) throws ParseException, ExecutableException {
323      if (JsonMap.class.isAssignableFrom(type.inner()))
324         return new JsonMap(map);
325      return map;
326   }
327
328   private static String stripInlineComment(String value) {
329      if (value == null || !value.contains("#"))
330         return value;
331      var inQuote = false;
332      for (var i = 0; i < value.length(); i++) {
333         var c = value.charAt(i);
334         if (c == '\'')
335            inQuote = !inQuote;
336         else if (c == '#' && !inQuote)
337            return value.substring(0, i).trim();
338      }
339      return value;
340   }
341}
